caseStudy.title: How Finoglyad Scaled to 50,000+ Monthly Readers
caseStudy.subtitle: Finoglyad.com is Ukraine's leading financial comparison portal, running on Scalaro's Content Platform since 2023.
caseStudy.challengeText: Finoglyad needed a robust content platform that could handle high traffic volumes, support Ukrainian language content, and integrate with their existing comparison engine. They were outgrowing their previous CMS.
caseStudy.solutionText: We deployed our Content Platform with custom Ukrainian-language SEO optimization, integrated their comparison widgets, and built a custom analytics dashboard for their editorial team.
caseStudy.resultText: Within 6 months, Finoglyad tripled their organic traffic and became the go-to financial comparison resource in Ukraine. The platform handles 50,000+ monthly visitors without any performance issues.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Scalaro and our products.

items.q: What does 'white-label' mean in your context?
items.a: White-label means you get the full product under your own brand. Your logo, your domain, your colors. Your clients and partners never know you're using Scalaro. You own the relationship.

items.q: How long does it take to launch?
items.a: For the Affiliate Tracking Software, typical setup is 3-5 business days. For the Content Platform, it's 2-3 days. Complex custom integrations may take 1-2 weeks. We provide a detailed timeline in every proposal.

items.q: What kind of support do you provide?
items.a: Every client gets a dedicated account manager, access to our technical support team (response time < 4 hours), comprehensive documentation, and monthly strategy reviews. Enterprise clients get priority support with < 1 hour response time.

Yes. If you need features beyond our standard offering, our development team can build custom integrations, workflows, and features. Custom development is scoped and priced separately from the platform license.

items.q: What payment methods do you support for affiliate payouts?
items.a: Our tracking platform supports bank transfers, PayPal, cryptocurrency, and custom payment integrations. We can integrate with any payment processor via our API. Multi-currency support is included.

items.q: Is there a limit on the number of affiliates or content pieces?
items.a: No hard limits on our Growth and Enterprise plans. Starter plans have soft limits that we'll discuss during onboarding. We're designed to scale with you.

items.q: How do you handle fraud prevention?
items.a: Our tracking platform includes built-in fraud detection that monitors for click fraud, cookie stuffing, and conversion manipulation. We use IP analysis, device fingerprinting, and behavioral patterns to flag suspicious activity in real-time.

items.q: What's in the CPA Network roadmap?
items.a: We're launching our own CPA Network in Q3 2025. Existing clients will get priority access and preferential rates. The network will focus on Fintech, SaaS, and e-commerce verticals.

items.q: Can I migrate from my current platform?
items.a: Yes. We have migration tools and a dedicated migration team that has successfully moved clients from HasOffers, Post Affiliate Pro, Impact, and custom-built systems. We handle all data migration with zero downtime.

items.q: Do you have a free trial?
items.a: We offer a 14-day free trial for the Content Platform. For the Affiliate Tracking Software, we do a personalized demo followed by a 30-day pilot program. Contact us to discuss what works best for your situation.
